query:
SELECT id, title, leadSource, createdAt FROM deals 
WHERE title LIKE '%Test Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Idempotent Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Notification Test%' 
   OR title LIKE '%No Dup Notif%'
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Notif%'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT id, title, leadSource, createdAt FROM deals 
WHERE title LIKE '%Test Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Idempotent Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Lead%' 
   OR title LIKE '%Notification Test%' 
   OR title LIKE '%No Dup Notif%'
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Notif%'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 50;
